purpose: Unify physical Qi, process Qi, runtime Qi, lineage Qi, boundary Qi, and delivery Qi into a single operational candidate-state field that feeds Qi Runtime Binding and Qi Cycle Runner.

total_field_principle.statement: Qi total field is not a category map. It is a state-normalization and coupling layer that turns physical, process, runtime, lineage, boundary, and delivery Qi evidence into OS-cycle inputs for Qi Runtime Binding.
total_field_principle.runtime_formula: qi_total_state = normalize(physical_qi, process_qi, runtime_qi, lineage_qi, boundary_qi, delivery_qi) -> qi_runtime_binding -> qi_cycle_runner
total_field_principle.non_reification_rule: Qi total field is relational operational evidence only; it is not substance, truth authority, execution authority, final commitment authority, memory overwrite authority, theorem proof, clinical authority, or completed OS identity.

qi_sources.meaning: Physical or biophysical Qi evidence as observable support for process continuity, thermodynamic activity, recovery, or path-weight visibility.
Process-level Qi evidence from transition continuity, memory continuity, and non-Markovian support.
OS runtime Qi evidence from candidate variation, policy, value, and barrier surfaces.
Audit and memory lineage Qi evidence from receipt hash, support refs, registry key, and review continuity.
Boundary Qi evidence from two-truths gap, noncollapse guard, overwrite blocker, and identity blocker.
Projection and delivery Qi evidence from view delivery receipt, channel scope, acknowledgment marker, and nonfinal marker.

normalization_rules.meaning: Boundary Qi cannot be weakened by physical/process/runtime Qi support.
Physical Qi can support runtime variation or value witness only when boundary and nonfinal markers remain visible.
Process Qi supports candidate motion when process tensor or transition continuity is visible.
Lineage Qi requires receipt hash, support refs, and registry key before allowing lineage flow.
Delivery Qi requires view delivery receipt, channel scope, acknowledgment marker, and nonfinal marker.

required_invariants: qi total field must feed Qi Runtime Binding and Qi Cycle Runner
physical qi must affect runtime support but must not override boundary failure
process qi must affect candidate motion but must not grant execution authority
lineage qi must remain hash-bound and append-only
delivery qi must remain nonfinal communication metadata
qi total field is not a classification-only layer
qi total field is not reified as substance, authority, world identity, or completed OS identity
